name: Blueberry-Cheese Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
In a large bowl, cream together 1 1/4 cups sugar and 1/2 cup of the butter. Add eggs. In a separate bowl, combine 2 1/2 cups flour, the baking powder and salt. Gradually add to the creamed mixture, alternating with milk; mix well after each addition. Beat in the cream cheese, mixing thoroughly. Stir in the lemon peel.
Toss blueberries with 2 tablespoons flour and gently fold into the batter. Pour into a greased 9-by-13-by-2-inch pan. Sprinkle the remaining sugar, butter, flour and lemon peel over the batter. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 to 50 minutes.
